mapper.select:
SELECT items.id, items.name, items.category_id AS categoryId, items.amount, items.deadline, items.purchase_date AS purchaseDate, items.others, items.status, items.favorite_flg AS favorite, categories.name AS categoryName FROM items INNER JOIN categories ON items.category_id = categories.id WHERE items.status = 1 AND items.user_id = #{userId}
AND items.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND items.amount LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND items.others LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY category_id ASC, deadline ASC
